title: Peppery Crumbly Moroccan Rice Paper Sheets
description: A nutritious meal-prep dish featuring rice paper sheets seasoned with peppery flavors and cooked on a tandoor for an authentic Moroccan taste.
instructions: Soak rice paper sheets in water for about 5 minutes to make them crispier.
In a small bowl, mix paprika, cayenne pepper, and black pepper together.
Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat. Add the spice mixture and cook until fragrant.
Gently fold the rice paper sheets into triangles. Place each folded sheet between two plates to flatten slightly.
Drizzle cooked spicy oil mixture over the rice paper sheets. Sprinkle chopped fresh ginger over them as well.
Place a tray or plate on top of the rice paper sheets for even pressing until crispy, about 5-10 minutes.
Serve immediately while they are still crisp and peppery.
